raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a auto warranty for {$3600.00}. I was told by XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX Protect that I could get a full refund within 30 days of my purchase. I then decided I did not want the policy and I told him to cancel my policy. I then disputed the charge with my Citibank Credit Card. Unfortunately, I then settled the dispute thinking that XXXX XXXX XXXX would keep their word and refund me the money. It has been over three weeks, and I have not received the refund. Citibank told me that I lost all my rights to reopen the dispute when I settled the dispute. I had no idea that I was forfeiting my rights to dispute the charge. Is there anything I can do?
